name: plan-handoff
description: Save the latest proposed plan from a Codex session into a repo-local handoff and resume implementation from it in a fresh session.

interface.shortDescription: Save a plan handoff and resume it in a fresh session
interface.longDescription: Use Plan Handoff to capture the latest proposed implementation plan from the current Codex session into a repo-local handoff file, then resume from that saved plan in a fresh session without restoring the full conversation.
defaultPrompt: Save the latest plan for next session handoff.
Resume implementation from the saved handoff.
Prepare or continue a repo-local plan handoff.
